title: stelis veracrucensis
intro: Stelis veracrucensis, also known as the Veracruz stelis or Mexican stelis, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Stelis veracrucensis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by making a tea from its roots and leaves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, or by using it in herbal infusions and tinctures.
